header.name: Redemption — LearnDash course unlock
header.description: Listens for `custom`-type WB Gamification redemptions whose admin-defined description starts with "course:" and grants access to the matching LearnDash course. Drop this file into wp-content/plugins/redemption-learndash-course/your-plugin.php.
